title: Registration step 1 requires required personal fields before continuing
description: Verifies step 1 blocks navigation to step 2 when required personal data is missing.

title: Has children enabled requires children count before continuing
description: Verifies that when hasChildren is enabled, childrenCount becomes required to proceed from step 2.

title: Proceed through steps with valid contact/location inputs
description: Verifies step 3 accepts valid contact/location inputs and allows moving to step 4.

title: Step 4 requires agreeing to terms before submitting
description: Verifies that registration cannot be submitted unless the agreeTerms checkbox is checked.

title: Password and confirm password must match
description: Verifies a visible validation error appears when password and confirmPassword do not match.

title: Existing email shows error and user stays on registration page
description: Verifies submitting step 4 with an already-registered email shows an error message and does not redirect to dashboards.

title: Update full profile details successfully
description: Verifies a logged-in user can update all profile sections and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Type "Maria" into the First Name field
Type "Gonzalez" into the Last Name field
Select "DNI" from the Document Type dropdown
Type "12345678" into the Document Number field
Click on the "Female" gender radio option
Type "1990-05-12" into the Birth Date field
Select "Married" from the Marital Status dropdown
Click on the Has Children switch to toggle it
Type "Buenos Aires" into the City field
Type "Av. Siempre Viva 742" into the Address field

title: Save minimal changes (name only) successfully
description: Verifies a user can update only first and last name and successfully save changes.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Type "Juan" into the First Name field
Type "Perez" into the Last Name field

title: Attempt to save with required name fields cleared shows validation error
description: Verifies client-side validation prevents saving when required name fields are empty.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Type "" into the First Name field
Type "" into the Last Name field

title: Invalid birth date format shows validation error
description: Verifies entering an invalid birth date format blocks saving and shows an error.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Type "not-a-date" into the Birth Date field

title: Invalid phone value shows validation error
description: Verifies the phone field rejects invalid input and prevents saving.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu

title: Document type and number can be saved together
description: Verifies selecting a document type and entering a document number saves successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Select "Passport" from the Document Type dropdown
Type "A1234567" into the Document Number field

title: Gender radio selection persists after successful save
description: Verifies changing gender via radio buttons can be saved and remains selected afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Male" gender radio option
Verify element "Male gender radio option" is visible

title: Marital status selection saves successfully
description: Verifies a user can change marital status and save the update.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Select "Single" from the Marital Status dropdown

title: Has Children toggle can be changed and saved
description: Verifies toggling the Has Children switch can be saved and reflected on the page.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Click on the Has Children switch to toggle it
Verify element "Has Children switch" is visible

title: Save failure shows an error alert
description: Verifies that when the save operation fails, an error alert is displayed instead of success.

steps.description: Click on "Account Settings" in the main navigation menu
Type "Test" into the First Name field
Type "Failure" into the Last Name field

title: Change password successfully from Account Settings > Seguridad
description: Verifies a logged-in user can change their password by entering the current password and matching new password confirmation and sees a success alert.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu

title: Show error when current password is incorrect
description: Verifies the change password form rejects an incorrect current password and shows a visible error message.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu
Type "wrong-current-password" into the current password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm new password field

title: Validation error when new password and confirmation do not match
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error when confirmation does not match the new password.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the current password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123?" into the confirm new password field

title: Required field validation when submitting with all fields empty
description: Verifies the change password form shows visible required-field errors when submitted without any input.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu

title: Prevent submission when only current password is provided
description: Verifies the form shows visible validation errors and does not proceed when new password fields are missing.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the current password field

title: Prevent submission when new password is provided but confirmation is empty
description: Verifies the form shows a visible validation error when confirmation is missing.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the current password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field

title: Form remains on Seguridad tab after an incorrect current password error
description: Verifies that after a failed password change attempt, the user stays on the Seguridad tab and can see the change password section.

steps.description: Click on the Account Settings option in the app navigation/menu
Type "wrong-current-password" into the current password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Type "NewPassword123!" into the confirm new password field

title: Admin can filter users and update role/status via edit drawer
description: Verifies an admin can search and filter the user table, open the edit drawer, change role and active status, save, and see the updated chips in the table.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu
Click the edit icon for the first row in the table
Verify element "Edit user drawer" is visible
Select "Usuario" from the role field in the edit drawer
Select "Activo" from the status field in the edit drawer
Click the "Guardar" button in the drawer

title: Search filters the admin user table results
description: Verifies typing in the search field filters the visible rows in the admin user list table.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu

title: Role filter dropdown limits results to a single role
description: Verifies the Rol filter can be applied and the table still renders results consistent with the selected role.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu

title: Status filter dropdown limits results to Activo users
description: Verifies the Estado filter can be applied to show only active users and the table updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu

title: Open user detail from the list using the eye icon
description: Verifies clicking the eye icon navigates away from the list into a user detail view page.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu
Click the eye icon for the first row in the table

title: Deactivate a user from the list workflow
description: Verifies an admin can deactivate a user from the list and sees the user reflected as inactive in the UI.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu
Click the "Desactivar" button for the first row in the table

title: Pagination controls allow navigating to another page of users
description: Verifies the user list supports pagination and switching pages keeps the table visible and updated.

steps.description: Click on the "Usuarios" option in the admin section of the navigation menu

title: Non-admin user cannot access Admin User List (authorization enforced)
description: Verifies a non-admin account does not gain access to the admin user list page and sees an access denied state.

title: Admin views user details and switches between tabs
description: Verifies an admin can open a user detail view, see left-panel summary, and view both Personal Info and Location tabs.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Verify the users table is visible

title: Admin opens a user detail view from the user list
description: Verifies an admin can navigate from the admin users list into a specific user's detail view.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Click on the first user row in the users table

title: Admin user detail view shows left panel with avatar, key info, role and status chips
description: Verifies the user detail view displays the left panel elements including avatar/basic info and role/status chips.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Click on the first user row in the users table

title: Admin can view Personal Information tab details
description: Verifies the Personal Information tab is accessible and displays expected personal detail fields.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Click on the first user row in the users table

title: Admin can view Location tab details
description: Verifies the Location tab is accessible and displays expected location detail fields.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Click on the first user row in the users table

title: Admin deactivates a user and sees status update
description: Verifies an admin can deactivate a user from the detail view and sees a visible success/status change afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Click on the first user row in the users table

title: Admin can return to the user list using Volver
description: Verifies the Volver button returns the admin from the user detail view back to the users list page.

steps.description: Click on "Usuarios" in the admin navigation/menu
Click on the first user row in the users table

title: Non-admin cannot access admin user detail view (access denied message)
description: Verifies a non-admin user is blocked from accessing the admin user detail view and sees an access denied state.

title: Sidebar navigation between Dashboard and Account Settings, then logout via user dropdown
description: Verifies core navigation links in the sidebar and logout flow from the user dropdown.

steps.description: Click the user avatar to open the dropdown

title: Sidebar 'Inicio' returns user to Dashboard from Account Settings
description: Verifies the 'Inicio' sidebar item routes back to the dashboard page.

steps.description: Click "Inicio" in the sidebar to go to dashboard

title: User dropdown 'Mi Cuenta' navigates to Account Settings from Dashboard
description: Verifies the 'Mi Cuenta' option inside the user dropdown routes to account settings.

steps.description: Click the user avatar to open the dropdown

title: Non-admin user does not see 'Usuarios' link in navigation
description: Verifies the admin-only 'Usuarios' navigation entry is not visible for non-admin users.

steps.description: Click to open the sidebar menu if it is collapsed

title: Non-admin direct access attempt to Admin Users page shows access denied
description: Verifies a non-admin cannot access the admin user list page and sees an access denied message.

title: Admin indicator appears in user dropdown for admin users (if logged in as admin)
description: Verifies the user dropdown shows an Admin indicator (chip/label) when the logged-in user is an admin.

steps.description: Click the user avatar to open the dropdown

title: Admin can navigate to 'Usuarios' from sidebar (admin only)
description: Verifies an admin user can reach the admin user list using the sidebar navigation.

steps.description: Click "Usuarios" in the sidebar admin section to go to user list

title: Admin can navigate to 'Usuarios' from user dropdown (admin only)
description: Verifies an admin user can reach the admin user list using the user dropdown navigation.

steps.description: Click the user avatar to open the dropdown
